summary: Iteration 4 frontend-only verification of the polished 'Manage Rooms' module: login → nav → carousel behaviour (translateX + dots + stopPropagation), $/₦ currency restriction, categorised amenities toggling, strict 3–7 image rule, NGN room creation with ₦ price overlay, grouped 'Facilities & services' modal, and mobile 390x844 responsiveness. All flows verified working end-to-end — no functional regressions found.

test_results.login_and_nav_to_rooms: PASS — password 'Secret123!' + enter-console-button + nav-item-rooms opens manage-rooms-panel
test_results.card_image_carousel: PASS — Next moves track translateX(0%) → -100%, Prev reverses, dot-2 jumps to translateX(-200%); all carousel controls stopPropagation (facilities modal parent pointer-events remained 'none' after Next click on rt-exec-king)
test_results.currency_selector_restriction: PASS — room-currency-select contains EXACTLY 2 options: '$ USD' and '₦ NGN' (no EUR/GBP/INR)
test_results.create_room_with_NGN: PASS — Selecting ₦ NGN, price 180000, title 'Lagos Skyline Suite', 3 images, save-listing-button prepends a new room-card whose room-price-{newId} renders '₦180,000 /night'; app-toast fired
test_results.categorised_amenities_form: PASS — All 5 amenity-category-* blocks present (bathroom, media-tech, room-amenities, food-drink, general-services); amenity-toggle-free-wifi/-air-conditioning/-flat-tv/-private-bathroom/-pool present; toggling flips aria-pressed
test_results.strict_3_7_image_rule: PASS — save-listing-button disabled at 0/1/2 images with helper 'Please upload at least 3 images…', enabled at 3 with 'Great — ready to publish', deleting back to 2 re-disables save, dropzone becomes disabled at 7 (verified — subsequent click attempt confirmed the button is disabled)
test_results.show_all_facilities_modal: PASS — show-all-facilities-rt-panorama opens facilities-modal, groups items under facilities-category-{bathroom,media-tech,room-amenities,food-drink,general-services}; facility-item-free-wifi/-pool/-private-bathroom/-flat-tv rendered; facilities-modal-close closes the modal
test_results.regression_toast_and_grid: PASS — app-toast still fires on save; rooms-grid layout unchanged (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3)
test_results.mobile_responsiveness_390x844: PASS — rooms-grid collapses to 1 column, carousel chevrons visible (opacity=1) on mobile, facilities modal renders as bottom sheet (parent uses items-end), 0px horizontal overflow

critical_code_review_comments: RoomFormPanel.tsx (345 lines) is nearing the 700-line soft cap; if further complexity is added consider extracting the image-matrix uploader and the categorised amenities section into subcomponents.

RoomFormPanel state stores currency as the SYMBOL ('$' or '₦') rather than the code ('USD'/'NGN'). Works today but is a fragile pattern — persisting the code and looking up the symbol at render time would be more robust (e.g. if a future currency shared a symbol).
Facilities modal correctly uses pointer-events-none for closed state, but the modal DOM is always mounted (with hidden opacity + translate). Fine for perf here, worth documenting.
test_credentials: Mocked login: any non-empty password (used 'Secret123!'). No /app/memory/test_credentials.md required.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data; all state is client-side in mockData.ts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manage Rooms module (carousel + 2-currency selector + categorised amenities + facilities modal + 3-7 image rule) fully verified in this iteration. Login uses login-password-input + enter-console-button. Currency values in the <select> are the SYMBOLS ('$' or '₦'), so page.select_option(..., value='₦') is the correct API. Facilities modal is always mounted — check its 'open' state via computed pointer-events on the .fixed parent, not just visibility. Mobile chevrons are md:opacity-0 md:group-hover so they are fully visible below md.
